package.name: argus_nav
package.description: ARGUS navigation pillar: dense stereo perception + reactive obstacle avoidance, built additively on the frozen contract. The stereo_depth node turns the existing cam0/cam1 pair into a dense depth image and an outlier-filtered 3D point cloud (block-matching disparity -> reprojection -> statistical outlier removal). The reactive_avoider node consumes that cloud as a live obstacle field and drives the holonomic kinematic drone down the corridor with a potential-field planner (goal attraction + obstacle repulsion -> /argus/cmd_vel), so the drone navigates the enriched world and weaves around in-path obstacles without a scripted path. Consumes only the public contract topics and adds new /argus/depth/* and /argus/nav/* topics; it does not change any frozen interface.
